title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Lido Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
jsonLd.skills: Educational Technology, Mentoring, LMS Platforms, Content Creation, Lesson Planning, CBSE/ICSE Standards, Student Assessment, Pedagogy
